title: LinkedIn Professional Snapshot
content: LinkedIn-aligned professional profile for Nishanth Manoharan highlights his background in generative AI, analytics engineering, data engineering, RAG systems, machine learning, and recruiter-focused technical projects.

title: LinkedIn About Summary
content: Nishanth's public professional profile centers on building grounded AI systems, analytics solutions, data pipelines, and decision-support tools using cloud, machine learning, and business intelligence platforms.

title: LinkedIn Experience Highlight: Exact Sciences
content: Exact Sciences is his current professional role, where he works on enterprise retrieval evaluation, embedding and reranker benchmarking, synthetic knowledge generation, and LLM quality evaluation for grounded assistant behavior.

title: LinkedIn Education Highlight
content: His education background includes a Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering at Northeastern University and a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science from SRM Institute of Science and Technology.

title: LinkedIn Highlights
content: LinkedIn-relevant highlights include experience across generative AI, RAG, enterprise retrieval evaluation, analytics engineering, dashboarding, forecasting, and cloud-based data systems.
